spk_a.transcript: What a martyr craves more than anything is a sword to fall on. So you sharpen the blade, hold it at just the right angle, and then, three, two, one.

spk_b.transcript: I have no idea how they got this. I specifically told my staff to destroy everything. I can't imagine...
